name: Barbara Larson
bio: Barbara Larson was appointed Chief Financial Officer of SentinelOne in September 2024, succeeding David Bernhardt. Her FY2025 totals reflect a partial year (~5 months in the role) plus a sign-on equity grant. Future fiscal years will reflect a full annualized package.

footnotes: Ms. Larson was appointed Chief Financial Officer in September 2024; salary, non-equity incentive, and other compensation reflect a partial fiscal year.
Stock Awards are dominated by Ms. Larson's sign-on RSU and PSU grants. Assuming maximum performance, the FY2025 PSU grant would have a grant-date fair value of $1,950,911.
